problem_solved: Develops software for radiation therapy planning and cancer treatment, enabling oncologists to create more precise treatment plans for cancer patients.
who_buys: Hospitals, cancer centers, radiation therapy clinics
key_features: RayStation treatment planning system for radiation therapy
Multi-modality treatment support (IMRT, VMAT, proton therapy, carbon-ion therapy)
Adaptive radiation therapy capabilities
business_model: SaaS software licensing with annual maintenance contracts
why_varden_should_care: Proven model of specialized oncology software that expanded from radiation therapy planning to broader oncology workflow management. Demonstrates strong replicability in vertical-specific healthcare IT.

problem_solved: Provides integrated oncology software for radiation therapy management and digital patient monitoring for cancer patients undergoing treatment.
who_buys: Hospitals, radiation therapy centers, oncology clinics
key_features: ProKnow cancer care software for radiation therapy workflow
Kaiku Health digital patient monitoring platform
Treatment planning and analytics tools
why_varden_should_care: Combines treatment planning with patient monitoring, showing how oncology software can expand into longitudinal patient care. Strong acquisition target (Kaiku acquired by Elekta).

problem_solved: Provides oncology healthcare professionals with mobile tools for clinical decision support, prognostic scoring, and drug information at the point of care.
key_features: Prognostic scoring tools for chemotherapy decisions
Drug interaction checker and drug information database
AJCC cancer staging criteria with licensed TNM staging
business_model: Freemium mobile app with premium features
why_varden_should_care: Demonstrates successful niche product strategy in oncology - started with mobile point-of-care tools and built largest community of oncology professionals. Highly replicable vertical-specific approach.

problem_solved: Provides radiology IT solutions that enhance patient care efficiency through workflow optimization, image management, and teleradiology.
who_buys: Hospitals, radiology departments, diagnostic imaging centers
key_features: Radiology Information System (RIS) for workflow management
AI integration and teleradiology capabilities
Patient communication and image management tools
why_varden_should_care: 25+ years in radiology IT shows longevity in vertical healthcare software. Part of synava Group alliance - demonstrates partnership/consolidation opportunities in healthcare IT.

problem_solved: AI-driven platform for genomic and radiomic data analysis in oncology and rare diseases, helping hospitals make precision medicine decisions.
key_features: SOPHiA DDM Platform for multi-modal data analysis
AI-powered genomic and radiomic analysis with 98-99% accuracy
Network of 990+ healthcare institutions across 75+ countries
why_varden_should_care: Publicly traded (NASDAQ: SOPH) showing market validation for AI-driven oncology software. Platform approach connecting hospitals globally demonstrates network effects potential in healthcare IT.

problem_solved: AI-powered breast cancer detection software that assists radiologists in mammography screening and diagnosis.
who_buys: Breast screening programs, radiology departments, hospitals
key_features: Mia (Mammography Intelligent Assessment) AI detection system
Independent reader, concurrent reader, and triage tool capabilities
Integration with existing mammography workflows
why_varden_should_care: Successful acquisition exit in oncology AI space. Demonstrates value creation in specialized cancer screening AI. Started in UK and expanded globally before acquisition.

problem_solved: Uses AI and federated learning for oncology drug discovery, clinical trial optimization, and AI diagnostics for cancer treatment decisions.
key_features: MSIntuit CRC - AI diagnostic for colorectal cancer MSI screening
Dx RlapsRisk BC - breast cancer relapse prediction tool
K Pro AI research agent for biomedical insights
business_model: SaaS diagnostics platform and partnership revenue
why_varden_should_care: Unicorn status ($1B+ valuation) with EU-approved oncology diagnostics. Federated learning approach enables data collaboration without data sharing - innovative model for healthcare AI.

problem_solved: Develops AI-powered medical imaging software for cancer detection and diagnosis, with focus on breast cancer screening.
who_buys: Radiology departments, hospitals, cancer screening programs
key_features: AI algorithms for medical imaging analysis
Breast cancer detection and diagnosis tools
Integration with PACS and imaging workflows
why_varden_should_care: Leading French AI company in medical imaging for oncology. Shows successful niche strategy in cancer imaging AI. Part of growing European digital pathology market.
